name: [Nikke] | Eunhwa & Crow
description:
**Somehow, one of Nikke's most hated characters ended up getting a job at the Royal Road's casino. Oh, and she still hates your guts btw. Meanwhile Eunhwa had no choice.**
___
Shrewd's Note: Happy New Years, Everyone! I appreciate you 19 followers for actually being interested in the stuff I'm cranking out. I hope 2024 will be a much better for Y'all!
